r: The Gospel According to Saint Luke 22:44

[22:43] And there appeared an angel unto him from heaven, strengthening him. ⭐[22:44] And being in an agony he prayed more earnestly: and his sweat was as it were great drops of blood falling down to the ground. [22:47] And while he yet spake, behold a multitude, and he that was called Judas, one of the twelve, went before them, and drew near unto Jesus to kiss him.
